landing.heroSubtitle: Businesses create campaigns with real prize pools. Creators compete by posting content. Top performers climb the leaderboard and win cash. Simple.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to start earning
landing.step1Desc: Browse active campaigns from top Ethiopian brands. Pick one that matches your style and audience.
landing.step2Desc: Post your best TikTok or Instagram content. Your performance is tracked automatically in real-time.
landing.step3Desc: Top creators on the leaderboard split the prize pool. More engagement = bigger rewards.
landing.noActiveCampaigns: No active campaigns right now — check back soon!
landing.readySubtitle: Whether you're a business looking to amplify your brand or a creator ready to earn — CreatorPay has you covered.

profilePage.completeProfile: Complete your profile to get verified
profilePage.fullVerification: Full verification — eligible for premium campaigns
profilePage.basicTier: Basic tier — complete more info to level up
profilePage.fillDetails: Fill in your details to unlock verification tiers
profilePage.uploadID: Upload national ID or passport (JPG, PNG, PDF)
profilePage.idHint: Uploading an ID upgrades you from Basic → Verified tier
profilePage.uploadLicense: Click to upload license document (PDF, JPG, PNG)
profilePage.underReviewText: Our team is reviewing your documents. This usually takes 1–2 business days.
profilePage.verifiedText: Your business is verified. You can create campaigns.
profilePage.rejectedText: Your verification was rejected. Please update your details and resubmit.
profilePage.suspendedText: Your account has been suspended. Contact support.

verificationPending.title: Verification Under Review
verificationPending.text: Your business account is currently being reviewed by our team. This usually takes 1–2 business days. You'll get access to the platform once your account is approved.
verificationPending.whileYouWait: While you wait, make sure you've submitted:

verificationRejected.title: Verification Rejected
verificationRejected.text: Your business verification was rejected. Please review the feedback below and resubmit your documents.
verificationRejected.defaultReason: Documents insufficient or invalid. Please re-upload a clear copy of your business license and ensure all information is accurate.

leaderboardPage.selectCampaign: Select a campaign to view its leaderboard
leaderboardPage.noActiveCampaignsText: Leaderboards will appear here when campaigns are running.

notFound.subtitle: Page not found
notFound.text: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.
